_comment: Subset of the FastAPI OpenAPI spec hand-curated as Anthropic-style tool definitions. At runtime you should instead ingest ${TERP_AGENT_BASE_URL}/openapi.json — FastAPI generates this automatically and stays in sync with the routers. This file is a reference for how each operation_id maps to a tool.

tools.name: get_profile
tools.description: Fetch the student's full profile: major, year, GPA, interests, skills, saved items.

tools.name: list_assignments
tools.description: List upcoming assignments with due dates; filter by course_id, due_within (e.g. '7d'), only_unsubmitted.

tools.name: match_events
tools.description: Rank Terplink events for the student. Returns {item, score, why, blockers}.

tools.name: match_handshake_jobs
tools.description: Rank Handshake postings by skills/year/GPA fit.

tools.name: match_ta
tools.description: Rank TA openings. Blockers list prereq courses not yet completed.

tools.name: match_ra
tools.description: Rank RA openings by interest/skill overlap.

tools.name: match_scholarships
tools.description: Rank scholarships by eligibility and deadline urgency.

tools.name: match_housing
tools.description: Rank housing listings by budget, distance, amenities.

tools.name: suggest_friends
tools.description: Rank classmates for friendship/roommate fit. overlap: interests|shared_classes|hometown.

tools.name: match_professors
tools.description: Which profs to approach for research or to take a class with.

tools.name: draft_professor_email
tools.description: Generate a profile-tailored outreach email. purpose: research|office_hours|recommendation.

tools.name: book_room
tools.description: Book a library room. ISO-8601 start.

tools.name: track_scholarship
tools.description: Add a scholarship to the student's tracker.
